parents.subject: LU-18435 lod: recover layout generation from replay

commit.subject: LU-0000 lod: save layout generations at start
commit.message:
LU-0000 lod: save layout generations at start

save layout generations at transaction start, no at declaration
because sometime we need to declare few changes each incrementing
layout generation.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-flr,sanity-flr,sanity-flr
Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-pfl,sanity-pfl,sanity-pfl
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ifaf7034229a7be5c87cd40e2ab1eaec4d9f2f862
